text.title: SonarQube AI-Code Gate Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule id from content/01-core-rules.xml for gov-sonarqube-ai-code-gate.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the team run SonarQube with PR scans and can identify AI authors?

example.trace: Agent opens PR with `Co-Authored-By: Claude` → CI detects AI author → applies `ai-strict-v1` gate → Sonar reports coverage 78% on new code → gate fails → PR blocked → agent adds tests → coverage 88% → gate passes.
